description: Deferred extensions to COMP-ROADMAP-XREF-PUSH: (1) roadmap_xref_push MCP tool, (2) local-provider push (delegates to the sibling repo's own setFeatureStatus → respects its transition policy/lifecycle guard/ROADMAP regen, degrade-skip on rejection), (3) additive relabel via expect_labels (add missing labels, never remove). Same dry-run-default + push:true opt-in + degrade-never-write posture.

completions.notes: v1 shipped: roadmap_xref_push MCP tool + local-provider push (sibling delegation) + additive relabel (expect_labels). Full suite green, reviewed CLEAN.
